MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication As To First And Second Causes Of Action
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Prior to Open court Ms. Work appears, the matter is uncontested, party will submit a proposed order.

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's unopposed Motion for Summary Judgment or in the Alternative Summary Adjudication as to First and Second Causes of Action is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
